headline: How The Intertek Group (LSE:ITRK) Narrative Is Shifting With Refined Analyst Targets And Valuation Assumptions
summary: Intertek Group’s fair value estimate has been adjusted from £53.99 to £53.46, signalling a small recalibration in how the shares are being valued. This sits alongside Street targets ranging from £4,475 to £5,847, where modest upward and downward moves reflect differing comfort levels with execution risks and growth assumptions. Read on to see how to interpret these shifting targets and what to watch as the analyst story around Intertek continues to evolve. Analyst Price Targets don't always...

headline: Gold Pares Dramatic Losses as Trump Backs Off From Iran Threat
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Gold pared dramatic losses as US President Donald Trump postponed military strikes against Iranian energy infrastructure for a five-day period after what he described as productive talks toward ending hostilities.Spot gold briefly traded higher after Trump said the Strait of Hormuz will be open soon under joint control with US. Silver rebounded, erasing losses of more than 10%. US stocks rose while Treasury yields and the dollar retreated. Traders reduced bets on Federal Reserve t
